title: pelargonium × camaldulense
intro: Pelargonium × camaldulense, also known as Camfield or Mountain Rose Geranium, is a hybrid plant species within the Geraniaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits associated with this plant include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve digestion, and alleviate symptoms of menopause. The herbal preparations of Pelargonium × camaldulense include teas, essential oils, and capsules, which can be used to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
